title: 日本ダービーの後に・一難去って…

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Trainer... We did it, we really did it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With all the heavens observing my trial, I
managed to put on a race that will not invite their
scorn. With this, my life has run its course...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I'm still alive and kicking, but still... I'm
just so happy with this result! Praise be!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, no need for that! I just did what I
could.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Although... I can say that Suzuka and I have
forged a brilliant testament to our generation's
Derby!
choice_data_list: Are you ready for the next challenge?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, I guess so... But the next one should be
easier, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We must consult the sticks! Oh, this doesn't bode well... Alas, there can be no doubt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The divination stick is engraved with the
venerable crest of the Kikuka chrysanthemum.
Which can only mean—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gyahhhhh! Let it be anything but that! Gods,
Buddha, Trainer, anyone—have mercy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is 3,000 meters long! And the
dreaded Yodo Hill on the third corner is even
steeper than the abyss that leads to the
underworld!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't have enough luck for that kind of distance!
Let's go somewhere shorter!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... You're right. The gods do work in
mysterious ways...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So be it! Even bad—nay, grave circumstances can
still be turned around!
